---
title: "Chapter 3: Probability Distributions and Statistical Foundations"
---

# Probability Distributions and Statistical Foundations

## Overview

Understanding probability distributions is essential for statistics (and for SEM). This chapter covers the fundamentals of probability distributions and how they are used.

## Learning Objectives

- Define random variables and probability distributions
- Understand and work with the normal distribution
- Identify key probability distributions used in SEM (chi-square, t, F)
- Explain the Central Limit Theorem and its implications
- Use probability functions in R


## Lecture Slides

- [Probability Distributions](slides/probability_distributions.qmd)
